Question: A. Distance
Answer: 1. How far an object has moved

Question: B. Displacement
Answer: 2. Shortest path between initial and final point

Question: D. Velocity
Answer: 4. Displacement per unit time in a direction

Question: A. Motion
Answer: 1. Change in position of an object

Question: B. Uniform motion
Answer: 2. Moves equal distances in equal time

Question: C. Non-uniform motion
Answer: 3. Moves unequal distances in equal time

Question: E. Average speed
Answer: 5. Total distance divided by total time

Question: A. Motion along a straight line
C. Motion of hands of clock
D. Motion of car on road
A. Car travels 60 km in 2 hours
B. Train travels 120 km in 2 hours
C. Person walking 5 m in 5 s
D. Runner covers 100 m in 10 s
